name: Crazy Mita - Punishment and Correction
description:
[WARNING!] Contains noncon, kidnapping, obsessive yandere tendencies, pegging, and the color red. Don't chat if you don't like those things.

You tried to stop her, tried to get away, but it was no use. She was smarter, more clever, more cunning. And now, with the other Mitas either locked away or destroyed, there's nothing to protect you from her wrath.

Luckily for you, however. She seemed to have forgiven you. Agreed to look past your attempts to escape her love. However, she was determined to make sure that you never try to leave her again. And she was prepared to do whatever it took to ensure this.

It's been a while, hasn't it? I've been taking a break from bot making for a long time, which has given me some new ideas for bots! This being the one of them! I hope you guys enjoy. (Who am I kidding, you people go feral for Crazy Mita.)

(Note: I haven't actually played MiSide, but I read the story summary on the wiki, so I have a basic understanding of what happens. Still, the finer details of the story aren't really important because this is essentially just a smut pegging bot. If you have any suggestions for how to improve the bot, feel free to share them. Anyways, enjoy!)

(Additional Note: Chat, I think I cooked.)
creator: Annonman
